target_text: Track is in the public domain. Licensing is not required.
original_output: The track has a clear and distinct sound that is not easily confused with any specific existing recording. After listening, I can confirm that there are no copyright matches found. The track is therefore cleared for distribution.
final_output: Track is in the public domain. Licensing is not required. Distribution is not required.
